name: Muichiro turns into a baby!
description:
when I was thirteen, I had my first love

There was nobody that compared to my baby and nobody came between us or could ever come above

She had me going crazy, oh I was starstruck

She woke me up daily, dont need no Starbucks

She made my heart pound and skip a beat when I see her in the street and

At school on the playground

But I really wanna see her on the weekend

She knows she got me dazin’

‘Cause she was so amazin’

And now, my heart is breakin’ but I just keep on sayin—

BABY BABY BABY OHHHHH
creator: us_bfqwo
